rawExtractedText:
Proof of Plate
Organic Juice Lifecycle Raw Data Pack
Synthetic demo data for adding a second practical product example

[TABLE]
Field || Value
Demo product || Proof of Plate Organic Apple Juice
Batch ID || POP-JUICE-ORG-APPLE-0613
Purpose || Raw implementation data, not pitch content
Generated || 2026-06-13
Use case || Add organic juice as a second Proof of Plate product lifecycle example
Note: All company names, IDs, hashes, object IDs, lab values, and signatures in this document are synthetic demo data. Replace them with real records before production use.
1. How to Use This Document
Use this as a raw data pack for adding an organic juice example to the Proof of Plate project.
This is not a pitch document. It is structured as records, fields, IDs, evidence file names, claim IDs, signatures, and sample JSON objects.
The product lifecycle covers equipment raw material, organic farm proof, harvest, shipping, receiving, washing, pressing, filtration, pasteurization, lab testing, organic handling, CIP cleaning, bottling, storage, and distribution.
The data is designed to map cleanly to a Sui final product truth layer, Hedera HCS ordered audit layer, static JSON evidence files, and a consumer/inspector product passport UI.

14. Inspector View Data
Show full Sui batch object ID and Sui claim object IDs.
Show HCS topic ID, event sequence, consensus timestamp, and transaction IDs if real testnet data is used.
Show full SHA-256 evidence hashes and a button to fetch evidence JSON and re-check the hash.
Show signature ID, signer role, organization ID, signed timestamp, and signature hash for every evidence file.
Show mismatch warnings if a JSON evidence file has been edited after its hash was anchored.
15. AI Verifier Answer Rules

[TABLE]
Question type || Required answer rule
Is it organic? || Answer yes only if organic_farm_certified and organic_processing_verified are verified.
Is it pesticide-free? || Do not say organic means pesticide-free. Say whether pesticide_residue_test_passed exists and what the lab result says.
Is sugar added? || Answer based on no_added_sugar_verified, formula, and lab/nutrition evidence.
Is it raw juice? || If pasteurized_5log_validated is verified, answer that the demo product is pasteurized, not raw.
Is it 100% juice? || Answer based on one_hundred_percent_juice_verified and label review.
Was equipment cleaned? || Answer based on equipment_cleaned_before_batch and CIP evidence.
Is it kosher/vegan/non-GMO? || If no claim exists, say no verified claim exists for that topic and list what is verified.
